title: eleocharis elliottii
intro: Eleocharis elliottii, also known as Elliott's spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Eleocharis elliottii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for consumption, and its essential oil can also be extracted for topical applications.
